content.text: How many days of earned leave does a DeepLens employee get per year?
One day of earned leave is earned for every 20 days of work, roughly 12 days per 240 working days per year.
What is the notice period for resignation at DeepLens?
The standard notice period for resignation or termination is 30 days.
How many weeks of maternity leave is a DeepLens employee entitled to?
Female employees are entitled to up to 26 weeks of paid maternity leave for childbirth or miscarriage.
What is the PF contribution percentage at DeepLens?
Both the employee and employer contribute 12% of basic salary plus dearness allowance each month.
What are the standard working hours at DeepLens?
Core office hours are from 10:00 AM to 6:30 PM Monday through Friday, with a 30-minute lunch break, limited to 9 hours per day and 48 hours per week.
What happens if an employee is absent without leave at DeepLens?
Unauthorized absence is considered serious misconduct and may lead to disciplinary action.
How long is the probation period at DeepLens?
New hires typically begin on probation for up to 6 months or as specified in the offer letter.
What is the gratuity eligibility at DeepLens?
Eligible employees with 5 or more years of service receive gratuity calculated as half a month's last drawn salary for each year of completed service.
How many casual leave days does DeepLens provide?
DeepLens typically provides 8 to 12 casual leave days per year.
What is the ESI contribution by employer and employee at DeepLens?
0.75% of wages is deducted from employees and 3.25% is paid by the company.
